title: Match Masters
notes:
Leap into our latest update!
Meet Froggy Fu, our new zen Legendary booster. A lotus tile kicker that turns matches into big scores.
Space Chase returns, simplified and designed for smoother play!
Power-ups will return soon as a time-limited event, where your regular boosters will act as power-ups at no extra cost.
Update now and jump into the action!

title: Ragnarok M : Eternal Love
notes:
=====Hero Class – Himmelmez=====
Wherever she steps, the dead rise to her command.
As war banners rise over the ruins of Glast Heim, and the undead legion marches to her will...
She weaves a fatal trap using the power of death.
You, them – Everyone is merely a pawn in her scheme.
Struggle. Despair. Then, face the endgame.
=====Battle Pets Debut===== Brand-new Battle Pets enter the fray! A versatile contract system brings richer strategies to your combat experience.
